hero_title: Share the passion at the Expo
hero_lead: Old, new, classic, modern, restored, original, modified, off-road, camping or urban — if it has a Land Rover badge or spirit, this is the day to see it, display it, explore it and talk about it.
ticket_status: Online ticket purchase is being prepared for the Expo microsite. For now this button is a placeholder while the new site is tested.

index.label: Home
index.title: Share the passion at the Expo
index.lead: Old, new, classic, modern, restored, original, modified, off-road, camping or urban — if it has a Land Rover badge or spirit, this is the day to see it, display it, explore it and talk about it.
index.body: Browse club displays, talk to owners, compare builds, find parts and ideas, and enjoy a relaxed winter day at Hawkesbury Showground.

cards.title: Bring the passion
cards.text: Defender, Discovery, Range Rover, Series, Perentie, Forward Control, restored, modified or working — the variety is the point.

cards.title: Meet owners and clubs
cards.text: Talk practical upgrades, touring setup, restoration work, camping ideas and the stories behind the vehicles.

cards.title: Parts, ideas and gear
cards.text: Find useful spares, tools, accessories and trader displays while catching up with the wider Land Rover community.

visitor-info.label: Visitors
visitor-info.title: Visitor information
visitor-info.lead: Everything visitors need to enjoy the Land Rover Owners Expo.
visitor-info.body: Use this page to keep public visitor guidance up to date as Expo planning develops.

cards.title: Entry
cards.text: Pre-purchased ticket: $10; purchase at gate: $15; under 16s free. Ticketing remains stubbed while the microsite is prepared.

cards.title: What to see
cards.text: Land Rover displays, club and owner vehicles, swap/sell and parts interest, camping, touring and restoration ideas.

cards.title: Bring along
cards.text: Warm layers and weather gear, comfortable shoes, a notebook for part numbers and ideas, and your Land Rover questions.

exhibitors.label: Exhibitors
exhibitors.title: Exhibitors
exhibitors.lead: Showcase your Land Rover, Range Rover, Discovery, Defender, Freelander, Evoque, military, Perentie or Forward Control and help visitors experience the breadth of the marque.
exhibitors.body: Use this page for exhibitor application details, arrival times, display conditions and setup notes.

cards.title: Who should exhibit?
cards.text: Owners with restored, original, modified, touring, camping, military, classic or modern vehicles are encouraged to take part.

cards.title: Exhibitor info to confirm
cards.text: Arrival and setup times, gate entry instructions, display area allocation, insurance or safety requirements and pack-down timing.

caterers.label: Caterers
caterers.title: Caterers
caterers.lead: Food and coffee vendors help make Expo a full-day destination for families, members, exhibitors and visitors.
caterers.body: Use this page for caterer expressions of interest, vendor requirements, power/water notes and insurance conditions.

cards.title: Caterer interest
cards.text: Food, coffee and refreshment vendors can register interest with the Expo team while site arrangements are finalised.

cards.title: Information needed
cards.text: Menu style, power/water needs, vehicle or trailer footprint, insurance and permits.

cards.title: Goal
cards.text: Keep visitors fed and comfortable so they stay longer, explore more vehicles and enjoy the day.

tickets.label: Tickets
tickets.title: Tickets
tickets.lead: Ticket purchase is being prepared for the new Expo microsite.
tickets.body: Publish ticketing updates here while the purchase workflow is stubbed.

cards.title: Planned pricing
cards.text: Earlybird pre-purchased tickets: $10; purchase at the gate: $15; under 16s free.

cards.title: Refund policy
cards.text: Refunds are planned up to 7 days before the event. Final ticketing terms will be confirmed when the production ticket flow is enabled.

camping.label: Camping
camping.title: Camping
camping.lead: Camping information for exhibitors and visitors planning to stay at or near Hawkesbury Showground.
camping.body: Use this page for camping request forms, bump-in/bump-out timing, facilities and rules.

cards.title: Camping requests
cards.text: The existing Expo planning includes a camping request form. The new microsite will link the current approved form from Downloads when finalised.

cards.title: What to confirm
cards.text: Arrival window, departure time, facilities, quiet hours and showground rules.

cards.title: Good preparation
cards.text: Pack for winter conditions, bring suitable lighting, and follow all showground and Expo volunteer directions.

sponsors.label: Sponsors
sponsors.title: Sponsors and traders
sponsors.lead: Promote Land Rover services, parts, accessories, touring gear and club-friendly businesses.
sponsors.body: Use this page for sponsor packages, trader stalls, swap/sell guidance and contact details.

cards.title: Sponsors
cards.text: Support the event, connect with an engaged 4WD audience and help grow the Land Rover community. Sponsor package details can be added here once approved.

cards.title: Traders / swap / sell
cards.text: Parts, accessories, services and practical touring gear are a natural fit. Expression-of-interest forms can be linked from Downloads when ready.

location.label: Location
location.title: Location
location.lead: Find Hawkesbury Showground and plan your trip to the Expo.
location.body: Venue and navigation information for Expo visitors.

cards.title: Venue
cards.text: Hawkesbury Showground, Racecourse Road, Clarendon NSW 2756. Final gate and parking instructions will be added as Expo planning progresses.

cards.title: Planning your trip
cards.text: Check traffic before departure, follow event signage and volunteer directions, allow time for parking and entry, and bring weather-appropriate gear.

downloads.label: Downloads
downloads.title: Downloads
downloads.lead: Expo forms, flyers and information sheets will be published here as planning progresses.
downloads.body: Add public PDF links or external document links here.

cards.title: Flyer
cards.text: Public Expo flyer download link will be published here when approved.

cards.title: Forms
cards.text: Camping, exhibitor, caterer and trader forms can be published here as PDFs or external links.

contact.label: Contact
contact.title: Contact
contact.lead: Contact the Expo team for visitor, exhibitor, caterer, sponsor and camping enquiries.
contact.body: Keep the public Expo contact information current here.

cards.title: Expo contact
cards.text: Jon Robinson — vicepresident@lroc.com.au. Use this for exhibitor, caterer, camping, ticketing and visitor enquiries until dedicated Expo forms are published.
cards.label: Email Expo team

cards.title: Club site
cards.text: Return to the main LROC site for membership, club documents, articles, magazines, vehicle help and member features.
cards.label: Main LROC site
